creator: bugsfreebsd@joshua.hu
text:
Hi,

Hardware acceleration on my Intel CPU was working well in Firefox for awhile, and as of a few weeks ago stopped working. In about:support, they are listed as green and supported with HW supported. When I load https://test-videos.co.uk/vids/bigbuckbunny/mp4/h264/1080/Big_Buck_Bunny_1080_10s_2MB.mp4 however, it says  "Video can't be played because the file is corrupt."


The log reveals some interesting information:

I was about to find https://github.com/jiixyj/epoll-shim/issues/23 from a few years ago, but it doesn't seem to be valid anymore.

I am running releng/13.4. firefox-130.0.1,2.
